message:
feat(pages): Complete P3.7 Settings & Storage Controls

- Add settings.js with full settings panel implementation
- Storage mode selector: memory (default), session, local
- OPFS persistence toggle with security warnings
- Cache management: clear current storage, OPFS, SW cache
- Session controls: lock session, reset everything
- Theme selector (auto/light/dark)
- Update bundle.rs to include settings.js

Also includes beads database updates - closed multiple verified tasks:
- Opt 4.1, 4.4, 4.5 (verified implementations)
- Phase 5 epic (all subtasks complete)
- P3.7 Settings (this commit)
- Documentation task j21i

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
